raw: Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card (no museum pass needed) at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Children 12 and under receive free admission to the Museum.

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket
source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children 12 and under receive free admission
